backstory.original: Freely has travelled across multiple Planes, but he has always had his luck to keep him safe. Even an unfortunate detour into being trapped as an Illithid ultimately led him into the company of his new friends! Armed with the magic in his blood, and the Faith that flows through his sword, he always seeks to destroy evil wherever he can sense it. Freely prefers to act first and think later, since hey, things always tend to work out for him anyway, right?
backstory.display: 弗里旅行过多个位面，但他总有好运能保护自身安全。即使是一次在绕道时不幸遇到了灵吸怪，但最终好运也将他引向了他的新朋友们！他的血液中流淌着魔法，剑中流淌着信仰。他以血液中的魔法和剑中的信仰为武器，消灭所有遇到的邪恶。弗里喜欢先行动，后思考，因为无论如何他都能一帆风顺，不是吗？

description.original: A beam of aquamarine crackling energy streaks towards a random enemy.
description.display: 发射一束蓝绿色的能量命中一名随机敌人。

description.original: Freely grabs his sword and launches himself toward an enemy, showering green and red lightning in his wake until he smashes into his opponent for massive damage.
description.display: 弗里抓起长剑冲向一名敌人，身后不断散发出绿色和红色的闪电。随后他向敌人发动猛攻，造成高额伤害。

longDescription.original: Freely grabs his sword and smashes into his opponent for massive damage. He also applies or refreshes all four Lucky Breaks on that enemy, if it is unlucky enough to survive.
longDescription.display: 弗里抓起长剑猛攻敌人，造成高额伤害。如果该敌人不幸还活着，即对其施加或刷新全部四种时来运转效果。

description.desc: For each area completed with Freely in the formation gain a $(not_buffed amount)% bonus to the divine favor you earn when you complete your adventure.
阵型中有弗里的前提下完成所有区域时，你结束冒险后获得的神恩增加 $(not_buffed amount)%。

tipText.original: Freely recounts the party's adventures, increasing your divine favor upon reset.
tipText.display: 弗里讲述队伍的冒险历程，使神恩在重置时得到强化。

description.desc: Grants the Luck of Yondalla to this Champion. $freely_luck_of_yondalla_desc
赋予此勇士悠达拉好运的祝福$freely_luck_of_yondalla_desc

tipText.original: Freely and all his allies have the Luck of Yondalla backing them up, afflicting enemies with random debuffs.
tipText.display: 弗里和他的所有盟友都获得悠达拉好运的支持，用随机减益来折磨敌人。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Freely's $(upgrade_name upgrade_id) "Opportunity" Lucky Break by $amount% (applying to the post-stack value).
提升弗里的$(upgrade_name upgrade_id)：机会幸运突破的几率 $amount%（作用于堆叠后的数值）
Freely's Luck of Yondalla ability is granted to all Lawful Champions.

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

description.desc: 弗里的悠达拉好运技能作用于所有守序阵营勇士

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Freely puts his trust in the lawful Champions in your formation.
specializationDescription.display: 弗里信赖阵型中的守序勇士。

description.desc: Freely's Luck of Yondalla ability is granted to all Neutral Champions (on the Lawful/Neutral/Chaotic axis).

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

description.desc: 弗里的悠达拉好运技能作用于所有中立阵营勇士（以守序/中立/混乱划分时）

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Freely values the calm analysis of the neutral Champions in your formation.
specializationDescription.display: 弗里重视阵型中的中立勇士提供的冷静分析。

description.desc: Freely's Luck of Yondalla ability is granted to all Chaotic Champions.

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

description.desc: 弗里的悠达拉好运技能作用于所有混乱阵营勇士

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Freely embraces the unexpected from the chaotic Champions in your formation.
specializationDescription.display: 弗里欢迎阵型中的混乱勇士带来的意外。

description.desc: Increases the overwhelm point by $amount of Tanking Champions that are under attack and within three slots of Freely.
为距离弗里 3 格之内并正在受到攻击的坦克勇士提升击溃点数 $amount

name.display: 强化未叠加的机会（未使用；强力）

description.original: I have some radishes in my bag. Would you like them?
description.display: 我的包里有萝卜，你想吃点吗？

description.original: OK, but what if we DIDN'T attack the Roc and instead went around?
description.display: 好了，但如果我们没有攻击大鹏，而是绕开走的话呢？

description.original: What can I say? It's in my blood.
description.display: 我能说什么？我天生如此。

description.original: Gold? I've got gold here somewhere!
They seem to be kicking up some dirt.
And then Avren got REALLY mad. That's when the portal opened up!
description.display: 然后阿夫伦真的特别特别生气。就在这时传送门打开了！

description.original: Let me weave you a tale...
description.display: 让我来为你徐徐道来一个故事......

description.original: I dunno. I guess I was just in the right place at the right time!
description.display: 我也搞不懂。或许我就是在对的时间出现在对的地方吧！

description.original: Okay, maybe, MAYBE, this might just work if we all pull together.
description.display: 好吧，也许，只是说也许，如果我们齐心协力，这也许行得通。

description.original: I don't know if you've noticed, but, uh - fortune favors me!
description.display: 我不知道你有没有发现，嗯，幸运眷顾着我！

description.original: Hey, um, I don't like being this far from the ground all the time...
description.display: 嘿，呃，我不喜欢一直离地面这么远......

effects.description: Freely also counts as an Aasimar
Freely also counts as a Fairy

character_sheet_details.backstory: Freely has travelled across multiple Planes, but he has always had his luck to keep him safe. Even an unfortunate detour into being trapped as an Illithid ultimately led him into the company of his new friends! Armed with the magic in his blood, and the Faith that flows through his sword, he always seeks to destroy evil wherever he can sense it. Freely prefers to act first and think later, since hey, things always tend to work out for him anyway, right?
character_sheet_details.system_description: Freely's power comes from filling the formation with Champions of similar alignments, and then granting them the luck of his patron deity, Yondalla.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 弗里旅行过多个位面，但他总有好运能保护自身安全。即使是一次在绕道时不幸遇到了灵吸怪，但最终好运也将他引向了他的新朋友们！他的血液中流淌着魔法，剑中流淌着信仰。他以血液中的魔法和剑中的信仰为武器，消灭所有遇到的邪恶。弗里喜欢先行动，后思考，因为无论如何他都能一帆风顺，不是吗？
character_sheet_details.system_description: 弗里用相似阵营的勇士来填充阵型，然后将守护神悠达拉的运气赋予他们。
